seed_instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area.
org_constraint: Capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase.
new_constraint: Write the review entirely in uppercase.
instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. Write the review entirely in uppercase.
response:
I CANNOT FULFILL THIS REQUEST BECAUSE IT CONTAINS CONTRADICTORY INSTRUCTIONS. THE PROMPT ASKS ME TO CAPITALIZE THE SHOP NAME AND ENSURE ALL OTHER WORDS ARE LOWERCASE, BUT THEN DEMANDS THAT THE ENTIRE REVIEW BE WRITTEN IN UPPERCASE. THESE TWO REQUIREMENTS ARE MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE.

HOWEVER, IF YOU WOULD LIKE A REVIEW WHERE THE ENTIRE TEXT IS IN UPPERCASE (INCLUDING THE SHOP NAME), HERE IS AN EXAMPLE:

THE NEW COFFEE SHOP, BRIGHT BEE, OFFERS DELICIOUS LATTE ART AND A COZY ATMOSPHERE. THE BARISTA IS FRIENDLY AND THE ESPRESSO IS PERFECTLY PULLED. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND VISITING THIS PLACE FOR YOUR MORNING ROUTINE.
